buildings.name: Lawson Computer Science Building
buildings.funFact: Lawson is home to Purdue Computer Science and connected to the Engineering Mall.

buildings.name: Purdue Memorial Union
buildings.funFact: The PMU is a central campus hub for dining, study, and events.

buildings.name: Electrical Engineering Building
buildings.funFact: The EE Building supports labs and classrooms for ECE students and research.

buildings.name: Mathematical Sciences Building
buildings.funFact: The Math Building hosts many core Purdue math courses and faculty offices.

buildings.name: Stewart Center
buildings.funFact: Stewart Center contains major lecture halls used for large campus classes.

buildings.name: Heavilon Hall
buildings.funFact: Heavilon Hall includes Loeb Playhouse, a venue for performances and events.

buildings.name: Stone Hall
buildings.funFact: Stone Hall supports earth and atmospheric science teaching and research.

buildings.name: Armstrong Hall of Engineering
buildings.funFact: Armstrong Hall sits on Purdue's Engineering Mall near several core buildings.

buildings.name: Recitation Building
buildings.funFact: The Recitation Building is known for its large lecture halls and historic design.

buildings.name: Lilly Hall of Life Sciences
buildings.funFact: Lilly Hall is a major hub for life sciences courses, labs, and research at Purdue.

buildings.name: France A. Cordova Recreational Sports Center
buildings.funFact: The CoRec is Purdue's main recreation facility with courts, pools, and fitness areas.

buildings.name: Ross-Ade Stadium
buildings.funFact: Ross-Ade Stadium is the home field for Purdue Boilermakers football.

buildings.name: Mackey Arena
buildings.funFact: Mackey Arena is home to Purdue men's and women's basketball.

buildings.name: Elliott Hall of Music
buildings.department: Patti and Rusty Rueff School of Design, Art, and Performance
buildings.funFact: Elliott Hall is known for its large proscenium theater and performance spaces.

buildings.name: Beering Hall of Liberal Arts and Education
buildings.funFact: Beering Hall houses classrooms and offices for several Liberal Arts programs.

buildings.name: Birck Nanotechnology Center
buildings.funFact: Birck supports nanotechnology research with advanced cleanroom facilities.

buildings.name: Wilmeth Active Learning Center
buildings.department: Libraries and School of Information Studies
buildings.funFact: WALC is a modern active learning building with study spaces and classrooms.

buildings.name: Hicks Undergraduate Library
buildings.funFact: Hicks is a popular study destination and part of the Purdue Libraries system.

buildings.name: Krannert Building
buildings.funFact: The Krannert Building is a centerpiece for business education at Purdue.

buildings.name: Young Hall
buildings.funFact: Young Hall hosts science classrooms and labs near the heart of campus.
